metadata.title: Select Flight | InstaDummyTicket
metadata.description: Choose a flight reservation and review your secure booking summary.

book.title: Select your flight
book.subtitle: Pick one of the available reservations. Your final PDF will use the same clean details shown in the summary.
book.loading: Finding available reservations for your route.

choice.title: Choose your ticket type
choice.subtitle: Select how you want this reservation prepared before we continue.
choice.routeSummary: Delhi (DEL) to Dubai (DXB) • 6 Jul 2026 — Return: 7 Jul 2026
choice.modalSubtitle: Standard lets you choose from available flights. Verifiable prepares a selected itinerary for passenger details.
choice.standardText: Search available reservations and choose the flight shown on your final PDF.
choice.verifiableText: Skip flight selection and continue with a ready verifiable itinerary preview.

standard.title: Standard Round Trip
standard.text: PDF itinerary, not verifiable online • Valid for 48 hrs

verifiable.title: Verifiable Round Trip
verifiable.text: Real PNR, CheckMyTrip verified • Valid for 48 hrs

metadata.title: Search Flight | InstaDummyTicket
metadata.description: Enter your route and travel dates to create a dummy ticket.

search.title: Search your trip
search.subtitle: Enter the route and dates for your visa-ready reservation. You can choose a matching flight on the next step.

details.title: Passenger details
details.subtitle: Enter the passenger information exactly as it should appear on the reservation.
details.requiredWarning: Please fill in all passenger details before continuing.
details.paymentReady: Passenger details are ready. Continue to secure payment.

summary.title: Dummy flight ticket
summary.encrypted: Your payment information is encrypted and securely processed.
summary.selectPrompt: Select a flight to preview the reservation details.

review.title: Review your order
review.subtitle: Check the reservation and passenger details before payment.
review.name: Name
